summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AbdoulGame with new Light/Dark mode toggle, expanded educational dictionary (12 categories), and updated game guide. All core features working correctly with 100% backend success and 95%+ frontend success.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint working
Security headers present (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection)
Knowledge database returns 39 educational words
All words have ES/EN/FR translations and info
All 12 educational categories present (philosophy, values, emotions, success, strength, relationships, learning, health, nature, spirituality, creativity, justice)
Categories endpoint returns all 12 categories with translations
Game generation works for levels 1, 5, and 10
Generated words include category information
Category filtering works for game generation
AI hints work in all 3 languages (ES/EN/FR) - no-cost local implementation
AI wisdom returns educational info in all 3 languages
Wisdom works for all 12 categories
Share text generation works in ES/EN
Score saving and retrieval works
Input sanitization removes dangerous characters
Light/Dark mode toggle cycles through auto/dark/light modes
CSS variables change correctly between modes (bg-primary, text-primary)
data-theme attribute updates correctly on document root
Language toggle works (ES/EN/FR with flag indicators)
Theme toggle works (neon/classic/gold)
Guide modal displays with educational categories mentioned
Game starts successfully with proper board generation
Cell selection works (tap functionality)
Selection preview updates in real-time
Clear button functionality working
Hint button properly disabled when score < 100
Settings modal accessible with display mode toggle
Word bank visible with target words
Knowledge banner displays wisdom text
Word finding works correctly (tested with ALMA word)
Score increases by 200 points when word found
Win condition triggers correctly when all words found
Win modal displays with trophy, score, level, and words found
Responsive design works (mobile portrait, mobile landscape, tablet)
Text contrast is good in both light and dark modes
critical_code_review_comments: Game generation sometimes places fewer words than target (1 instead of 3 for level 1) - this is due to word placement algorithm hitting max attempts. Consider increasing max_attempts or using smaller words for lower levels.
The deselection behavior only works when not swiping (isSwiping.current check) - this is intentional for swipe mode but may confuse users in tap mode
context_for_next_testing_agent: Light/Dark mode toggle working correctly with 3 states (auto/dark/light). CSS variables properly switch between modes. Educational dictionary has 39 words across 12 categories. Game word finding and scoring works correctly. Win condition triggers properly. All 3 languages (ES/EN/FR) and 3 themes (neon/classic/gold) working.

light_dark_mode.details: Toggle cycles through auto/dark/light modes. CSS variables change correctly. data-theme attribute updates on document root.

css_variables.details: Dark mode: bg-primary=#0a0a0f, text-primary=#ffffff. Light mode: bg-primary=#f5f5f7, text-primary=#1a1a2e

color_contrast.details: Text is legible in both modes with good contrast ratios

educational_dictionary.details: 39 words across 12 categories (Philosophy, Values, Emotions, Success, Strength, Relationships, Learning, Health, Nature, Spirituality, Creativity, Justice) in 3 languages

game_guide.details: Guide mentions educational categories and light/dark mode customization

word_selection.details: Tap selection works. Words can be found and scored correctly.

crossing_words.details: Found cells can be reselected for other words (verified in code review - selectCell allows selection regardless of found status)

responsive_design.details: Mobile portrait, mobile landscape (sidebar layout), and tablet layouts all working
